description_long: This is a cylindrical Coca-Cola can with a vibrant red background and the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo prominently displayed across the front. The can features realistic water droplets on its surface, suggesting it is cold and refreshing. Yellow and white swooping lines add dynamic visual interest to the design, wrapping around the can. The back of the can displays nutritional information, ingredients, and branding details in both French and English, along with recycling symbols and a barcode. The top of the can is metallic with a standard pull-tab opening, colored in a light blue shade. The overall appearance is clean, undamaged, and highly recognizable as a soft drink container.
description: A red Coca-Cola can with white script logo, water droplets, and a metallic pull-tab top. The can is detailed, undamaged, and features branding and nutritional information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola logo, water droplets, and part of the yellow and white swoosh design.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swooping yellow and white lines and partial logo, with water droplets visible.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the logo wrapping around, more of the swoosh design, and the start of the nutritional information panel.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the Coca-Cola logo at the top, detailed nutritional information, barcode, and recycling symbols.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white Coca-Cola script logo on a red background, yellow and white swoosh lines, nutritional information, barcode, recycling symbols, and text in both French and English.
